From: "Sean J. Lancaster" <bristolgv@earthlink.net>
Subject: FW: Sikorsky S-76C++
Date: Thu, 13 Dec 2007 15:07:39 GMT
To: lvjet@aol.com, lesley@nysgllc.com, "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>, lgroff@nysgmail.com

Please find the offer as per my email this morning.  Please be advised I
have told them $13.0 firm on the pricing.  They insist this the maximum they
will pay.

 

Best regards 

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

1-540-665-5135 direct

1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

1-540-533-8183 Mobile

1-540-301-0050 FAX

slancaster@bristolassociates.com

From: Rick Smith [mailto:rsmith@baliaircraft.com] 
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 9:18 AM
To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com
Subject: Sikorsky S-76C++

 

Sean:

 

As promised, attached is our offer for the S-76C++.  We've worked extremely
hard to get to this point and will appreciate all your efforts to get this
deal done.  Please let me know as soon as possible, if you hear from Mr.
Epstein.

 

Respectfully,
Rick Smith
Vice President
Business Aircraft Leasing, Inc.
615.361.3781 (ph)
615.367.1226 (fax)
